message:
fix(safety): non-finite timestamp guard, real page_size via sysconf, setpriority nice, tempdir for HNSW serialization

- connectors/mod.rs: reject non-finite (NaN/Inf) floats in parse_timestamp
  to prevent undefined behavior in the seconds-vs-milliseconds heuristic
- connectors/claude_code.rs: fix indentation in started_at match block
- daemon/resource.rs: replace hardcoded 4096 page_size with actual
  sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE) call; switch apply_nice from libc::nice() (which
  has ambiguous -1 return) to libc::setpriority() with explicit range
  validation (-20..=19); add out-of-range rejection test
- daemon/worker.rs: add unit tests for resolve_embedder_kind covering
  hash aliases, semantic aliases, and unknown-model rejection; reformat
  function signature
- search/ann_index.rs: replace .hnsw_tmp fixed directory with
  tempfile::tempdir() to avoid collisions from concurrent saves and
  guarantee cleanup on error paths via TempDir's Drop impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
